narrative:
Barberton 4-B (precinct in Summit County) has 1,102 registered voters, with 62.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 7.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 30.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 23.7 percentage points.
